meta.title: Server Actions and API Integration
meta.excerpt: Type-safe server actions and Strapi API integration patterns

seo.metaDescription: Type-safe server actions and Strapi API integration patterns

blocks.content: Documentation of Next.js server actions for secure data mutations, Zod validation, and integration patterns with Strapi API for both REST and GraphQL endpoints.

blocks.title: What Are Server Actions?
blocks.content: Async functions defined in 'use server' files that run only on the server and can be called from client components.

items: Secure access to databases and secrets

blocks.title: Creating a Server Action

items: Define validation schemas for all form inputs
Use type inference: type FormData = z.infer<typeof schema>

blocks.title: Example: Article Schema
Query Example
Mutation Example
Client Component
blocks.code:
<form action={submitContact}>
  <input type='text' name='name' required />
  <input type='email' name='email' required />
  <button type='submit'>Submit</button>
</form>

blocks.title: Server Action
blocks.content: Receives FormData, validates, sends to Strapi, returns response
